contact.toastDesc: We will get back to you as soon as possible.

about.title: About Us
about.intro: RideYo is Turkey's most innovative car sharing platform. Founded in 2024, our mission is to help people use their vehicles more efficiently and enable car owners to earn income from their cars.
about.vision: To create an ecosystem where everyone can access a reliable vehicle when needed by making urban transportation more sustainable, economical, and flexible.
about.mission: To build a secure bridge between car owners and renters with our technology and trust-focused approach, offering flexible minute, hourly, and daily rental options for every budget.

values.trust: Trust: The safety of all users on our platform is our priority.
values.transparency: Transparency: We have clear pricing and open communication policies.
values.sustainability: Sustainability: We reduce carbon footprint by encouraging car sharing.
values.innovation: Innovation: We deliver the best experience with continuously evolving technology.

about.how: RideYo enables car owners to rent out unused vehicles on the platform. Renters can easily rent vehicles by the minute, hour, or day. All transactions happen digitally through our secure payment infrastructure.
about.closing: Our story started in Trabzon and will soon expand across Turkey. Be part of this journey!

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you want to know about RideYo

general.a: RideYo is a platform that lets car owners rent out unused vehicles. Users can rent by the minute, hour, or day. All transactions are handled securely through the app.
We currently operate in Trabzon. We plan to expand to Istanbul, Ankara, Izmir, and other major cities soon.
Yes, all payments are processed through our secure payment infrastructure. Your card details are encrypted and PCI-DSS compliant.
Yes! RideYo has a mobile app for both iOS and Android. You can also access it from your web browser.

renter.q: What do I need to rent a car?
renter.a: First create an account and complete identity verification. Then select a suitable car, set your rental duration, and pay through the app.
A valid ID and at least 2 years of driving license are required. You must be 21-70 years old with a minimum driver score of 60.
Each car has minute, hourly, and daily rates. Charges are calculated automatically based on your rental duration.

renter.q: Is there a minimum rental period?
renter.a: Minimum 30 minutes for minute rentals, 1 hour for hourly, and 1 day for daily rentals.
Free cancellation up to 24 hours before start. 50% refund for 12-24 hours, no refund within 12 hours or for no-shows.

renter.q: How are pickup and return handled?
renter.a: Coordinate with the owner and complete pickup and return at the agreed location.
All vehicles are insured. In an accident, contact RideYo support (24/7) immediately.
Fuel is the renter's responsibility. Return the car with the same fuel level as pickup.
Traffic fines during the rental period belong to the renter.
Driver score is calculated from your rental history, reviews, penalty points, and traffic record.

owner.q: How can I rent out my car?
owner.a: Create a car owner account and add your vehicle details on the 'Add Car' page.
Vehicle registration, traffic insurance, optional comprehensive insurance, ID, and car photos are required.
Earnings depend on car type, pricing, and rental frequency. RideYo charges a 15% commission.
All rentals are covered by RideYo Mini Comprehensive Insurance. Mandatory traffic insurance is required on every vehicle.

owner.q: How and when are payments made?
owner.a: RideYo collects payment from renters, deducts 15% commission, and transfers the remainder within 7 business days.

owner.q: How can I protect my car?
owner.a: Track your car in real time with GPS. All renters pass identity and license verification.
Yes, you can accept or reject incoming reservation requests.

owner.q: What if my car is damaged?
owner.a: Notify RideYo immediately. Insured damage is covered by insurance.
Car rental income is taxable. RideYo provides monthly income reports.
Check driver score, reviews, rental history, and identity verification.

install.title: Install RideYo App
install.subtitle: Install on your phone and carry it everywhere. Works even without internet!
install.installedDesc: RideYo is now installed on your device. Open it from your home screen.
install.installHint: Install with one tap — no app store needed!
install.howToInstallDesc: Use "Add to Home Screen" from your browser menu
install.fastAccessDesc: Open directly from your home screen — no browser search needed
install.offlineDesc: Use without internet; data is cached
install.secureDesc: All data is encrypted; your privacy is protected
